001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.viewmodel;
002
003import android.content.Context;
004import android.content.SharedPreferences;
005import android.content.res.Resources;
006import android.util.Log;
007import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
008import androidx.lifecycle.Transformations;
009import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel;
010import androidx.preference.PreferenceManager;
011import dagger.hilt.InstallIn;
012import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel;
013import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext;
014import dagger.hilt.components.SingletonComponent;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.R;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare;
017import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.UserProfile;
018import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.pojo.DigSiteCoord;
019import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.pojo.DigSiteGridWithSquares;
020import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.GameplayService;
021import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository.DigSiteGridRepository;
022import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository.GoogleAuthRepository;
023import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.service.respository.UserProfileRepository;
024import jakarta.inject.Inject;
025import java.util.Map;
026
027@HiltViewModel
028public class GameplayViewModel extends ViewModel {
029
030  private final GameplayService gameplayService;
031  private final UserProfile currentUser;
032  private LiveData<DigSiteGridWithSquares> digSiteGridWithSquares;
033  private final DigSiteGridRepository digSiteGridRepository;
034  private final UserProfileRepository userProfileRepository;
035  private final Context context;
036  private final SharedPreferences prefs;
037  private ToolType currentTool = ToolType.DIG;
038  private LiveData<Integer> remainingBrushes;
039  private LiveData<Integer> scannerCount;
040
041  @Inject
042  public GameplayViewModel(GameplayService gameplayService,
043      DigSiteGridRepository digSiteGridRepository,
044      GoogleAuthRepository authRepo,
045      UserProfileRepository userRepo,
046      @ApplicationContext Context context) {
047    this.gameplayService = gameplayService;
048    this.digSiteGridRepository = digSiteGridRepository;
049    this.userProfileRepository = userRepo;
050    this.context = context;
051    currentUser = userRepo.getByOauthKey(authRepo.getLastOauthKey()).join();
052    prefs = PreferenceManager.getDefaultSharedPreferences(context);
053  }
054
055  public void continueOrStartNewGame() {
056    digSiteGridWithSquares = digSiteGridRepository.
057        getMostRecentDigSiteGridWithSquaresByPlayerId(currentUser.getId());
058    if (digSiteGridWithSquares.getValue() == null) {
059      Resources contextResources = context.getResources();
060      int boardWidth = prefs.getInt(contextResources.getString(R.string.board_width_pref_key),
061          contextResources.getInteger(R.integer.board_width_pref_default));
062      int boardHeight = prefs.getInt(contextResources.getString(R.string.board_height_pref_key),
063          contextResources.getInteger(R.integer.board_height_pref_default));
064      int boardFossilDensity = prefs.getInt(
065          contextResources.getString(R.string.board_fossil_density_pref_key),
066          contextResources.getInteger(R.integer.board_fossil_density_pref_default));
067      long newGameId = gameplayService.startNewDig(boardWidth, boardHeight, boardFossilDensity,
068          currentUser.getId());
069      digSiteGridWithSquares = digSiteGridRepository.getDigSiteGridWithSquaresById(newGameId);
070    }
071    remainingBrushes = Transformations.map(digSiteGridWithSquares,
072        DigSiteGridWithSquares::getRemainingBrushes);
073    scannerCount = userProfileRepository.getScanners(currentUser.getId());
074  }
075
076  public LiveData<DigSiteGridWithSquares> getGameLivedata() {
077    return digSiteGridWithSquares;
078  }
079
080  public void handleTapWithCurrentTool(DigSiteCoord coord) {
081    Log.d("GameplayViewModel", "Handling with tool: " + currentTool + " at coord: " + coord);
082    DigSiteGridWithSquares game = digSiteGridWithSquares.getValue();
083    if (game == null) {
084      return;
085    }
086    Map<DigSiteCoord, DigSiteSquare> gridSquaresMap = game.getGridSquares();
087    DigSiteSquare square = gridSquaresMap.get(coord);
088    if (square == null) {
089      return;
090    }
091    Integer currentScannerCount = scannerCount.getValue();
092    if (currentScannerCount == null) {
093      currentScannerCount = 0;
094    }
095    switch (currentTool) {
096      case DIG -> gameplayService.digSquare(gridSquaresMap, coord);
097      case EXTRACT -> gameplayService.extractSquare(square, game.getId(), game.getRemainingBrushes());
098      case FENCE -> gameplayService.toggleFenceSquare(square);
099      case SCAN -> gameplayService.scanSquare(gridSquaresMap, coord, currentUser.getId(), game.getId(), game.getRemainingBrushes(), currentScannerCount);
100    }
101  }
102
103  public void setCurrentTool(ToolType currentTool) {
104    this.currentTool = currentTool;
105  }
106
107  public LiveData<Integer> getRemainingBrushes() {
108    return remainingBrushes;
109  }
110
111  public LiveData<Integer> getScannerCount() {
112    return scannerCount;
113  }
114}
